response.justification: A highly experienced full-stack engineer (15+ years) with strong seniority, cloud exposure (AWS CDK), and high-scale data-integration work, plus recent hands-on involvement with MCP and agentic workflows. However, the role requires 8+ years of building production-grade AI solutions, and the candidate's GenAI/agent experience appears to begin only in April 2025. Core requirements — RAG, vector databases, Python, and LLM optimization — are absent or unproven, and there is little evidence of customer-facing technical-discovery leadership. Worth a screening conversation to probe depth of recent AI work, but currently a stretch against the must-haves.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience at senior/staff level across many domains
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling
Solid cloud and high-scale data infrastructure background (AWS, microservices, data integration)
concerns: Lacks the required 8+ years of production AI/GenAI experience (only months evident)
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM optimization expertise; Python not listed
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical-discovery leadership

key_factors.factor: Strong senior engineering + recent MCP/agent exposure
